summary: Iteration 43 - Mobile Responsive Redesign Testing Complete. ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports for: mobile hero with single column layout, dark #0D1B2A background, 10px eyebrow, 34px H1, flex-wrap trust row 12px, full-width stacked CTAs, 220px centered logo. Mobile sticky bottom bar with 3 buttons (CALL #FF5722 tel:, BOOK ONLINE dark bg /book?go=1, TEXT US #1A2F45 sms: with pre-filled message). Mobile header 60px with hamburger. Desktop regression confirms no bottom bar, 2-column hero grid, floating CALL NOW appears after scroll, map visible on desktop but hidden on mobile with city list still visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile hero (hero-mobile-wrapper) correctly shows display:block on <1024px and hidden on desktop
Mobile eyebrow: 10px fontSize with 1.8px letterSpacing - matches spec
Trust row: flex-wrap:wrap, gap:8px, fontSize:12px - matches spec
Mobile CTAs: full-width (350px), stacked (flex-direction:column) - matches spec
Mobile logo: 220px width, centered - matches spec
Mobile sticky bottom bar: position:fixed, bottom:0, 3-column grid, height:64px, zIndex:999
CALL button: #FF5722 bg, tel:+17605435733 href - CORRECT
BOOK ONLINE button: #0D1B2A bg, /book?go=1 href - CORRECT
TEXT US button: #1A2F45 bg, sms: with pre-filled message 'Hello FixitBay! I need help with my appliance. Could you please assist me?' - CORRECT
Mobile header: 60px height with hamburger visible, subtitle hidden - CORRECT
Map section: hidden on mobile (display:none on parent .hidden.lg:flex), city list visible - CORRECT
Footer: single column on mobile (326px), 4-column on desktop (311px x4)
Footer has media query for padding-bottom:90px for sticky bar clearance
Floating CALL NOW: hidden on mobile (display:none, has hidden md:flex classes), visible on desktop after scroll - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified complete mobile responsive redesign at 390x844 and 1920x800 viewports. Key mobile features: hero-mobile-wrapper with data-testid='hero-mobile', mobile-bottom-bar with 3 buttons (mobile-bar-call, mobile-bar-book, mobile-bar-text), 60px header with hamburger. Desktop maintains 2-column hero grid, no bottom bar, floating CALL NOW after scroll. Map hidden on mobile via .hidden.lg:flex parent. All responsive breakpoints working as expected. Base URL: https://fixitbay-seo-1.preview.emergentagent.com

text_btn.message: Hello FixitBay! I need help with my appliance. Could you please assist me?
